target.title: [codex] Make ChatGPT image generation easy for MCP agents
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a dedicated `chatgpt_image` MCP tool that wraps ChatGPT browser image generation with a small agent-friendly input shape.
- Add `generateImage` and `outputPath` to the general `consult` tool so advanced callers can still trigger the CLI `--generate-image` image-aware wait/download path directly.
- Return saved session artifacts, including a convenience `images` array with paths and ChatGPT file metadata, in structured MCP output.
- Document the new agent image workflow in MCP/browser docs, README, and changelog.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/mcp*.test.ts tests/mcp/**/*.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/mcp/chatgptImage.test.ts tests/mcp/utils.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check CHANGELOG.md README.md docs/browser-mode.md docs/mcp.md src/mcp/server.ts src/mcp/tools/consult.ts src/mcp/tools/chatgptImage.ts src/mcp/types.ts src/mcp/utils.ts tests/mcp/chatgptImage.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/mcp/utils.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/mcp/server.ts src/mcp/tools/consult.ts src/mcp/tools/chatgptImage.ts src/mcp/types.ts src/mcp/utils.ts tests/mcp/chatgptImage.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/mcp/utils.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit` fails on existing repo-wide issues unrelated to this patch: `scripts/check.ts` Bun/esbuild target typing and `tests/browser/chatgptImages.test.ts` fetch mock typing under Node 26.

---

## Review follow-ups (commits `cfa4f047`, `4ee828de`)

**Security hardening**
- Constrained agent-supplied `generateImage` / `outputPath` to `ORACLE_HOME_DIR` by default (`..` traversal rejected); `ORACLE_MCP_ALLOW_EXTERNAL_OUTPUT=1` opts into external paths. CLI `--generate-image` / `--output` unaffected.
- **Symlink hardening (P1):** the boundary check now resolves symlinks in the existing path prefix via `realpath` (deepest existing ancestor + non-existent remainder), so a symlinked parent under the Oracle home (e.g. `~/.oracle/generated -> /tmp/evil`) can no longer smuggle a write outside the boundary. Regression tests cover symlink escape for **both** fields (rejected by default), a within-home symlink (allowed), and an escape allowed under the explicit opt-in. The escape tests were verified to fail against the prior lexical check.

**Correctness / contract**
- Default image path carries a random suffix (no collision under parallel agent calls).
- `chatgpt_image` output reuses the typed `consult` output shape (`images` / `artifacts` / `resolved`).

**Live behavior proof (P1)** — real `chatgpt_image` MCP run (redacted), GPT-5.5 browser session, image downloaded via cookie-backed URL and saved under `ORACLE_HOME_DIR/generated/`:

```jsonc
// structuredContent (redacted)
{
  "status": "completed",
  "models": [{ "model": "gpt-5.5", "status": "completed", "usage": { "totalTokens": 81 } }],
  "images": [{
    "kind": "image",
    "path": "~/.oracle/generated/pr229-proof.png",
    "mimeType": "image/png",
    "sizeBytes": 962854,
    "width": 1254,
    "height": 1254,
    "fileId": "file_…<redacted>",
    "sourceUrl": "https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/estuary/content?id=file_…&sig=<redacted>"
  }],
  "artifacts": [
    { "kind": "image", "path": "~/.oracle/generated/pr229-proof.png", "sizeBytes": 962854 },
    { "kind": "transcript", "path": "~/.oracle/sessions/<id>/artifacts/transcript.md" }
  ],
  "requestedOutputPath": "~/.oracle/generated/pr229-proof.png"
}
```

Saved file verified on disk: `PNG image data, 1254 x 1254, 8-bit/color RGB` (963 KB).

**Verification**: `tests/mcp` 41 passed; `oxfmt --check` clean; `oxlint` clean on the listed files; no new typecheck errors in the changed files (the 3 pre-existing `tsgo` errors remain in untouched files).
target.author: umutkeltek
